data.title: outbound-bridge: empty summary field sent to Jira ACLI -> 'summary can't be null or blank' crash
data.description:
## Incident Overview
The Outbound Bridge GitHub Actions workflow fails when syncing a ticket whose title is empty or not extracted correctly. The ACLI command is invoked with `--summary ''`, causing Jira to reject the request: `Error: summary can't be null or blank`. The bridge script does not validate the summary field before sending it to ACLI, and the CalledProcessError is unhandled, crashing the entire bridge run.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. A ticket exists in the local ticket system with an empty or missing title
2. Outbound Bridge runs and attempts to create/update this ticket in Jira
3. ACLI rejects the empty summary

## Expected Behavior
The bridge should skip tickets with empty/missing titles (with a warning), or validate before sending to ACLI.

## Actual Behavior
Unhandled CalledProcessError crashes the bridge, preventing all subsequent tickets from syncing.

## Evidence
7 failures on 2026-04-02 and 2026-04-03:
- Runs 23930674867, 23926539669, 23926428500, 23925761642, 23922619721 — all 'summary can't be null or blank'
